interpretation: The 0065 NaN objective failure is fixed. The one-walker smoke is degenerate for seed 47 because the centered score-function energy tangent is zero and the overlap tangent also gives zero gradient. A local cheap-local-energy check reproduced this with walkers=1 and passed with walkers=2.
next_action: Allocate a new task with at least two walkers per state and rerun the scheduled real-local-energy training smoke.
